_doc: RobotUser1 tenant user record. Shows LoginToConsole=true (rules out branch 1) AND surfaces the stored-credential metadata: PasswordLastSet is 2026-05-04T09:00:00Z (eight days ago) while the AD password was rotated 2026-05-11T07:14:00Z (yesterday) — the Orchestrator credential is stale by ~7 days. This is the core evidence for playbook branch 3 (password mismatch / stale credential).

_meta.ad_password_last_set_source: user-supplied in initial report; verifiable via 'Get-ADUser user1 -Properties PasswordLastSet' on a domain controller
_meta.comment: Orchestrator-stored PasswordLastSet (2026-05-04) is older than the AD password rotation (2026-05-11). Stale credential — branch 3.
